improvements.suggestion: Require explicit wording whether a confirmed endpoint value is concrete or a canonical endpoint format, and require documenting how environment-specific values are supplied.
Add a checklist item to ensure endpoint examples and variable defaults are identical across spec.md, readme.md, and local.settings.json.example.
Instruct the implementor to avoid modifying unrelated placeholder/log files and to store process tracking only in required artifacts (for this workflow: agent-activity.log).
